helper_landscape_summary: KV-cache landscape via eOptShrinkQ spectral denoising, KV-Transform coding, FAEDKV Fourier, ALISA sparse, SentenceKV semantic, CommVQ RoPE-VQ, SVDq low-rank. None use quaternion/hypercomplex/4D-lattice structure.

hints.hint_text: Check whether FAEDKV/CommVQ/KV-Transform implicitly subsume quaternion as 4D rotation under different vocabulary.
Search Parcollet hypercomplex NN, PHM layer for the algebraic primitive.
Hurwitz quaternions+D4 lattice for vector quantization - signal-processing literature.
Composition: 'quaternion KV cache' joint phrase search.
Time-lag: quaternion ViT 2023 → KV-cache 2025-2026 contemporaneous risk.
Stripped: 'compress 4D tensors via integer-lattice quantization' - signal-processing prior art.

solver_traces.search_query: FAEDKV Fourier KV cache quaternion equivalent
solver_traces.reasoning: FAEDKV uses real-valued Fourier basis, not quaternion. Quaternion structure not subsumed.
PHM defines a hypercomplex multiplication primitive but at the parameter level (weight matrices), not KV-cache. Sub-mechanism M_3 (fast mul) is anticipated by PHM; M_1 M_2 M_4 are not.

solver_traces.search_query: D4 lattice vector quantization Hurwitz quaternion
solver_traces.reasoning: D4 lattice VQ is classical signal-processing (Conway-Sloane 1988); applied to KV-cache is novel composition.
Joint phrase yields zero arXiv hits; composition genuinely under-explored.
Existing taxonomy {quant,low-rank,eviction,sparse,transform-coding}. Quaternion lattice fits 'transform-coding + grouped-quant' hybrid - not a new branch.
No concurrent submission within 6 months observed.
Quaternion signal-compression literature exists (1990s-2010s) but for images/audio, not transformer KV. Stripped application falls outside indexed prior art.

tree_stream_rationale: H2 (anticipated, 0.55 PHM hypercomplex primitive) is the single 'anticipated' verdict - covers sub-mechanism M_3 (fast 4D-algebra mul) but leaves M_1/M_2/M_4 uncovered. Tree-stream FAIL synthesizes from step 10 mechanical FAIL (4 keyword hits) AND H2 anticipation; H4 (not_anticipated, 0.10 joint phrase) confirms composition under-explored. Q-rubric 0.5 ANTICIPATED via P_evidence saturation. Verdict aligned FAIL across step 10 + tree-stream + Q-rubric.
